name: kosmos-lsp
description: Wire the `kosmos-lsp` server (kosmos/1.1 multimodal knowledge-anchor manifest LSP — diagnostics + hover, re-validated on every edit) for `.kosmos` files in Claude Code. LSP config carried in plugin-root `.lsp.json` (the canonical Claude Code LSP filename — dot-prefixed; auto-discovered, no manifest field needed). Requires `kosmos-lsp` on PATH (install via `hx install dancinlab/kosmos`); if absent, Claude Code surfaces the error in /plugin Errors.
